text.content: MAXAM Tire Announced as Title Sponsor for the 2024 Bassmaster Elite Series

rich_text.plain_text: MAXAM Tire Announced as Title Sponsor for the 2024 Bassmaster Elite Series

text.content: Bringing together anglers and enthusiasts from all corners of the world

rich_text.plain_text: Bringing together anglers and enthusiasts from all corners of the world

text.content: [Danvers, Massachusetts January 24th, 2024] — MAXAM Tire, a renowned global leader in specialty tire manufacturing, is thrilled to announce its title sponsorship for the highly anticipated

rich_text.plain_text: [Danvers, Massachusetts January 24th, 2024] — MAXAM Tire, a renowned global leader in specialty tire manufacturing, is thrilled to announce its title sponsorship for the highly anticipated

text.content:
. The 2024 MAXAM Tire Bassmaster Elite at St. Johns River, is scheduled to take place from April 18 to April 21, 2024, in Palatka, Florida.

As the title sponsor, MAXAM Tire is excited to be a part of this prestigious fishing competition, bringing together anglers and enthusiasts from all corners of the world. MAXAM Tire's commitment to supporting the Bassmaster Elite Series demonstrates our dedication to the sport of fishing that our customers love, and our alignment with the values it represents.

Jimmy McDonnell, VP of Sales & Marketing for MAXAM Tire, expressed his enthusiasm for this partnership, stating, "Fishing is more than just a pastime; it's a sport that our customers wholeheartedly enjoy. It aligns perfectly with the MAXAM brand and our core values of precision, performance, and quality. Just as anglers rely on the best equipment to navigate challenging waters, MAXAM Tire provides top-tier specialty tires that offer reliability and performance in demanding conditions."

Tune in and watch Live coverage of all four days of the MAXAM Tires Bassmaster Elite at St. Johns River starts Thursday, April 18 on Bassmaster.com, Tubi and the FOX Sports digital platforms. FS1 will also broadcast live with the tournament leaders beginning at 8 a.m. ET on Saturday and Sunday.

For media inquiries, please contact: marketing@maxamtirena.com
